'''gochataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iceless|iceless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iceless|iceless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gochataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochatithi|gochatithi]] || [[word:gochatiji|gochatiji]] || [[word:gochatishi|gochatishi]] || [[word:gochatiki|gochatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochatuthuthu|gochatuthuthu]] || [[word:gochatujuju|gochatujuju]] || [[word:gochatushushu|gochatushushu]] || [[word:gochatukuku|gochatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochatuthu|gochatuthu]] || [[word:gochatuju|gochatuju]] || [[word:gochatushu|gochatushu]] || [[word:gochatuku|gochatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochatufthuf|gochatufthuf]] || [[word:gochatufjuf|gochatufjuf]] || [[word:gochatufshuf|gochatufshuf]] || [[word:gochatufkuf|gochatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochatethe|gochatethe]] || [[word:gochateje|gochateje]] || [[word:gochateshe|gochateshe]] || [[word:gochateke|gochateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochatothotho|gochatothotho]] || [[word:gochatojojo|gochatojojo]] || [[word:gochatoshosho|gochatoshosho]] || [[word:gochatokoko|gochatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochatotho|gochatotho]] || [[word:gochatojo|gochatojo]] || [[word:gochatosho|gochatosho]] || [[word:gochatoko|gochatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochatofthof|gochatofthof]] || [[word:gochatofjof|gochatofjof]] || [[word:gochatofshof|gochatofshof]] || [[word:gochatofkof|gochatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochatïfthïf|gochatïfthïf]] || [[word:gochatïfjïf|gochatïfjïf]] || [[word:gochatïfshïf|gochatïfshïf]] || [[word:gochatïfkïf|gochatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochatïfthïfthïf|gochatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gochatïfjïfjïf|gochatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gochatïfshïfshïf|gochatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gochatïfkïfkïf|gochatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochatïfthïf|gochatïfthïf]] || [[word:gochatïfjïf|gochatïfjïf]] || [[word:gochatïfshïf|gochatïfshïf]] || [[word:gochatïfkïf|gochatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochatïfthïf|gochatïfthïf]] || [[word:gochatïfjïf|gochatïfjïf]] || [[word:gochatïfshïf|gochatïfshïf]] || [[word:gochatïfkïf|gochatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gochatæthæ|gochatæthæ]] || [[word:gochatæjæ|gochatæjæ]] || [[word:gochatæshæ|gochatæshæ]] || [[word:gochatækæ|gochatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gochatathatha|gochatathatha]] || [[word:gochatajaja|gochatajaja]] || [[word:gochatashasha|gochatashasha]] || [[word:gochatakaka|gochatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gochatatha|gochatatha]] || [[word:gochataja|gochataja]] || [[word:gochatasha|gochatasha]] || [[word:gochataka|gochataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gochatafthaf|gochatafthaf]] || [[word:gochatafjaf|gochatafjaf]] || [[word:gochatafshaf|gochatafshaf]] || [[word:gochatafkaf|gochatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gochatasha|gochatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochatshësha|gochatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochatrosha|gochatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatmusha|gochatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochatyasha|gochatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochatnkshësha|gogochatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochatnkrosha|gogochatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochatnkmusha|gogochatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochatnkyasha|gogochatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gochachatasha|gochachatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochachatshësha|gochachatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochachatrosha|gochachatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachatmusha|gochachatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochachatyasha|gochachatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochachatnkshësha|gogochachatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochachatnkrosha|gogochachatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochachatnkmusha|gogochachatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochachatnkyasha|gogochachatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gechætasha|gechætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gechætshësha|gechætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gechætrosha|gechætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gechætmusha|gechætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gechætyasha|gechætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogechætnkshësha|gogechætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogechætnkrosha|gogechætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogechætnkmusha|gogechætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogechætnkyasha|gogechætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gochfatasha|gochfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gochfatshësha|gochfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochfatrosha|gochfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochfatmusha|gochfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochfatyasha|gochfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogochfatnkshësha|gogochfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogochfatnkrosha|gogochfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogochfatnkmusha|gogochfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogochfatnkyasha|gogochfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
